steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Bryan opposed the Constitution, then published essays disparaging federalists who supported it. These aren't contradictory—the essays naturally express his opposition. The key signal is: this is a natural fit, not a contrast.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Fittingly” directly captures this natural fit—his essays were an appropriate expression of his anti-federalist stance. The other options either introduce comparison, suggest contradiction, or imply restatement. That matches choice B — B is correct.
